summary: Applied systems R1 REQUEST_CHANGES: updated stale active routing fields to topology recovery review, removed protocol edits from the client task, and required systems_architect review for fixture work that may touch sim-core/content-runtime authority code.

decisions.decision: Active routing fields now point to M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-RECOVERY-001 review instead of old content-lock Human Gate waiting.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 no longer allows packages/protocol/**; protocol/schema changes remain owned by M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-SCHEMA-001.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 now requires systems_architect review when touching sim-core/content-runtime authority code.

requested_action: Read-only R2 review of the REQUEST_CHANGES fixes and return ACCEPT, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK.
